title: Slow Automations
excerpt: I’m new to Monday.com and am finding the automations to be slow. For example, I’ve added a button to a table, and the automation I’ve created behind it clears a task  assignee and resets all of the tasks status values. I…

posts.author: al.ricci (Al Ricci)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m new to Monday.com and am finding the automations to be slow. For example, I’ve added a button to a table, and the automation I’ve created behind it clears a task assignee and resets all of the tasks status values. In this particular board, I’ve got 23 tasks, and when I select the button on a particular task line it takes 14 seconds to finish running the automation (about 1 second per automation). Is this normal?

posts.author: Ded (Dedric)
posts.cookedHtml:
same here.
The execution time doesn’t seem to be the issue: it’s more the time required to trigger the automation to start…

Any one experiences the same ?

posts.author: Terry.Heard (Terry Heard)
posts.cookedHtml: Automations do seem to lag at times. A Status change was made on one of my boards and it took over 10 Minutes before the automation finally completed its task. All it had to do was move the item from one group to another.
